title: Vite configuration for UI development server with proxy and plugin setup
purpose: Configures the Vite development server for the UI application, including proxy settings, plugins, aliases, and build optimizations.
module_context: Defines a Vite configuration with a custom plugin for patching milkdown theme CSS layers and standard React plugin integration.

steps.content: Define a plugin that intercepts CSS files from milkdown theme nord.
Replace Tailwind-reserved layer names with custom prefixed names to avoid compilation errors.
Return transformed code with renamed CSS layers for proper cascade handling.
Skip transformation for non-milkdown CSS files.

methods.name: transform
methods.normalized_params: (code: string, id: string): { code: string; map: null } | null

steps.content: Extract the file path from the identifier by removing query parameters.
Check if the file path contains milkdown theme nord and ends with CSS extension.
If the conditions match, replace Tailwind layer directives with custom prefixed names.
Return the transformed code with renamed layers and null source map.
If conditions don't match, return null to skip transformation.
